name: gestion-electrification-massive
description: Application bureau pour pilotage d'électrification de masse

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:smoke
scripts.dev:saas: powershell -Command "$p5005 = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5005 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess; if($p5005){$p5005 | ForEach-Object {Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force}}; $p5173 = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess; if($p5173){$p5173 | ForEach-Object {Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force}}; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'cd backend; npm run dev'; Start-Sleep -s 3; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'cd frontend; npm run dev'"
